title: klasea coriacea
intro: Klasea coriacea, also known as bitter lettuce or bitter dock, is a perennial plant species in the Boraginaceae family. Traditionally, Klasea coriacea has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues such as indigestion and diarrhea due to its bitter compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Klasea coriacea can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
